overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a cyberpunk night market food stall. The player observes a vendor cooking on a neon-lit grill before walking along the food counter into the bustling market street lined with red lanterns and industrial piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall cooking area with active grill

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter watching the vendor prepare food on the grill

notable_agents.action: vendor cooking food on the grill, repeatedly flipping items and tending to the cooking surface

entered.detail: metal grill with glowing red heating elements and green vegetables being cooked
long metal counter with cooking equipment, condiments, and serving containers
teal and cyan neon light strips illuminating the right side of the stall
traditional red paper lanterns hanging in the background market area
steam and smoke rising from the hot grill surface creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk night market food stall where a vendor cooks on a glowing grill. Steam rises from the cooking surface as teal neon lights illuminate the counter. The camera remains stationary, focused on the vendor's repetitive cooking animations while red lanterns hang visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food vendors and seating

events.description: camera begins moving forward along the food stall counter, transitioning from the grill area into the market walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the food stall counter moving deeper into the night market, passing seated customers

notable_agents.action: person with blonde hair standing near green stool, looking at handheld device

entered.detail: futuristic digital displays with cyan text showing menu items and prices
green plastic stools and small tables for customers along the walkway
large yellow ventilation pipes and metal ductwork running overhead
large vertical advertisement poster with portrait on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the grill and walks along the food stall counter into the broader market area. Digital menu screens glow on the right while customers sit on green stools to the left. Large industrial pipes run overhead and red lanterns line the walkway as the scene opens up to show more of the cyberpunk market environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a focused observation of a cyberpunk food stall that establishes the atmospheric depth of a neon-lit night market. It begins with a stationary view of a vendor working over a glowing grill, where thick steam rises from the cooking surface. As the camera lingers, the teal neon lights of the counter cast a sharp glow over the repetitive motions of the cooking process. The scene then subtly expands the viewer's perspective to reveal red lanterns hanging in the distant background, grounding the intimate stall within the larger, bustling environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate space of a food stall into the expansive atmosphere of a bustling cyberpunk market. It begins by moving away from a cooking grill, gliding along a food counter where glowing digital menu screens flicker on the right. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal customers seated on green stools to the left, while the overhead space becomes dominated by heavy industrial piping. The scene then expands further into the broader market environment, guided by a line of red lanterns that stretch along the walkway.
